{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Akura armor
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Akura armor]] becomes harder to maintain the more stress is put on it.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
